raw.title: Bear Aware Walk
raw.description:
Free Program - Registration Required to secure your spot: https://www.rdco.intellionline.ca/WEBSITE/public/category/browse/BEARWLK

Ever wondered how to tell if a bear has been in the area? Join us for a guided walk on bear signs, behaviour, and seasonal movement patterns. Learn how to recognize tracks and feeding signs - and what to do if you encounter a bear while enjoying local parks.

For more information on other programs offered by the RDCO and registration details, please visit our website: https://www.rdco.intellionline.ca/WEBSITE/public.

events.title: Beethoven's Fifth
events.description: Experience the symphony that changed music forever. Shocking at the time of its premiere with its emotional intensity, today Beethoven’s 5th is one of the world’s most recognizable works of art. After more than a decade, the OSO returns to this iconic masterpiece to close the season with a monument of musical expression. This concert also features the Okanagan Symphony Chorus in Ola Gjeilo’s Sunrise Mass, a profound and expressive journey, full of soaring melodies and walls of sonic power.

events.title: Blossom & Bites: A Spring Lunch for Two
events.description:
A Springtime Meadery lunch for TWO! Enjoy the Spring Sunshine on our farm! Start with a Local, Charcuterie Bento Lunch in our Picnic Area or our picturesque outdoor Bistro and a guided wine tasting or flight of our honey wines. raw.title: Blossom & Bites: A Spring Lunch for Two
raw.description:
A Springtime Meadery lunch for TWO! Enjoy the Spring Sunshine on our farm! Start with a Local, Charcuterie Bento Lunch in our Picnic Area or our picturesque outdoor Bistro and a guided wine tasting or flight of our honey wines. Take our self-guided Bee Tour, take the Honeybee Challenge, play lawn games & enjoy farm fun.  Finish your experience with a scrumptious local Bernard Callebaut Chocolate Brownie with homemade honey ice cream for two! 

Includes:

Bento Local Charcuterie for two

Local meats & cheeses, house-made pickles, fresh fruit, house-made organic crostinis, homemade honey jams & accoutrements

2 Guided Wine Tastings featuring five of our award-winning honey wines  (local mocktails for non-drinkers or under 19!)

Bernard Callebaut Chocolate Brownie dessert with homemade honey ice cream to share

Self-Guided Bee Tour

Lawn games and picnic area

Take the Honeybee Challenge

Entry into our Spring Draw

*Please select a time slot between 11:30 am and 3:30 pm. Tickets required. We look forward to seeing you at the winery!

raw.title: Comedy for a Cause for Okangan United FC Mens Soccer
raw.description: Kick off your weekend with non-stop comedy for an awesome cause! Join us Friday, May 8th at 6:30 PM at Dakoda’s Comedy Lounge for Comedy for a Cause, benefiting the Okanagan United Men’s Soccer League (OUSL).The OUSL is quickly becoming the hotspot for the best local soccer talent in the Okanagan — a competitive, community-powered league that’s giving players the stage they deserve. Now you can support it while catching a stacked lineup of Kelowna’s funniest comedians in one ridiculously fun night.Expect sharp jokes, high-energy vibes, and laughs so good you’ll forget whether your team made the playoffs or not. Bring your friends, grab your tickets, and be part of a night that keeps both the comedy scene and the league thriving.See you there — the only thing better than the jokes will be the cause you’re supporting.

events.description: Join us in the Chef’s Theatre for an unforgettable evening celebrating the bold, vibrant flavours of Spain.At the heart of this demonstration dinner is the iconic paella—crafted live as our chefs guide you through the traditions, techniques, and ingredients that define this beloved dish.From the layering of saffron-infused rice to the careful building of flavour over fire, you’ll experience the artistry behind authentic paella while enjoying a curated selection of Spanish-inspired dishes. raw.title: Cooking Class: A Taste of Spain | The Art of Paella
raw.description:
Join us in the Chef’s Theatre for an unforgettable evening celebrating the bold, vibrant flavours of Spain.

At the heart of this demonstration dinner is the iconic paella—crafted live as our chefs guide you through the traditions, techniques, and ingredients that define this beloved dish.

From the layering of saffron-infused rice to the careful building of flavour over fire, you’ll experience the artistry behind authentic paella while enjoying a curated selection of Spanish-inspired dishes. Expect rich aromas, lively storytelling, and a true taste of coastal Spain brought to life before you.

Sit back, sip, and savour an evening of culinary craftsmanship—where every dish tells a story of tradition, technique, and passion.

events.title: Floor Opener
events.description: Lawrence Paul Yuxweluptun is one of Canada’s most outspoken and influential contemporary artists, confronting colonial suppression, environmental degradation, and the ongoing struggles for Indigenous sovereignty. Of Cowichan (Hul’q’umi’num Coast Salish) and Okanagan (Syilx) descent, his forty-year practice brings together traditional iconography, fearless critique, and biting satire to challenge and unsettle. Floor Opener presents a selection of works that are at once polemical and playful, imbu

raw.title: Floor Opener
raw.description: Lawrence Paul Yuxweluptun is one of Canada’s most outspoken and influential contemporary artists, confronting colonial suppression, environmental degradation, and the ongoing struggles for Indigenous sovereignty. Of Cowichan (Hul’q’umi’num Coast Salish) and Okanagan (Syilx) descent, his forty-year practice brings together traditional iconography, fearless critique, and biting satire to challenge and unsettle. Floor Opener presents a selection of works that are at once polemical and playful, imbued with a spiritual resonance that speaks urgently to the political and social realities of our time. This nationally significant exhibition is organized and circulated by the Kitchener-Waterloo Art Gallery, with artwork sourced from private collections in British Columbia.

raw.title: Guys & Dolls
raw.description:
Luck be a Lady Tonight!

Hailed as the perfect musical comedy, Guys & Dolls is a high-stakes hit packed with charm, wit, and one unforgettable score. Set in the stylized streets of Damon Runyon’s New York City, this classic tale of gamblers, showgirls, and salvation rolls the dice on love—and delivers big.

When slick gambler Nathan Detroit tries to secure a spot for his legendary floating craps game, he bets fellow high-roller Sky Masterson that he can’t take a proper missionary, Sarah Brown, out on a date. What follows is a madcap ride from Times Square to Havana, filled with romance, hijinks, and one showstopper after another.

Featuring Frank Loesser’s golden score—including hits like Luck Be a Lady and Sit Down, You’re Rockin’ the Boat—Guys & Dolls is a toe-tapping, heartwarming crowd-pleaser that proves when it comes to love… everyone’s got a shot.

Dinner & Show Experience: Table, Diamond Booth & Private Box Seating

Doors open at 5:30 PM for dinner service prior to the performance, which begins promptly at 7:00 PM. We kindly ask that all guests arrive in time to enjoy their meal before the show starts, as food service concludes prior to curtain to ensure a quiet and uninterrupted performance.

Enjoy full table service, including a curated selection of beverages, wines, and cocktails. Please note that food and beverages are not included in the ticket price. However, a complimentary dessert is included for all table seating guests and will be served during intermission.

For matinee performances, there is no food service offered, but a complimentary dessert is still included for table seating guests. All drinks are sold separately at both evening and matinee performances.

Join us early, relax, and make your evening a full dinner-and-show experience!



‍

events.title: Jese Lawrence Live
events.description: Jese Lawrence is an emerging alt-country artist from the Okanagan Valley, blending country, folk, & blues with raw, honest storytelling based upon his life experiences and rural upbringing. With a soulful style and a growing fanbase, he's quickly gaining the attention of the country music scene.
